ogTitle: Little Hampton vs Llanelly: Climate Safety

heading: Little Hampton vs Llanelly — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Little Hampton, Victoria and Llanelly, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Little Hampton has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Llanelly (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Little Hampton or Llanelly safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Little Hampton has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Llanelly scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Little Hampton scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. Llanelly scores 37/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Little Hampton or Llanelly?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Little Hampton has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.62% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
